entry.title: glm-5.1
entry.summary: GLM-5.1 is our next-generation flagship model for agentic engineering, with significantly stronger coding capabilities than its predecessor. It achieves state-of-the-art performance on SWE-Bench Pro and leads GLM-5 by a wide margin.
entry.content:
GLM-5.1 is our next-generation flagship model for agentic engineering, with significantly stronger coding capabilities than its predecessor. It achieves state-of-the-art performance on SWE-Bench Pro and leads GLM-5 by a wide margin.

Pulls: 24.4K

Tags: 1

entry.title: gemma4
entry.summary: Gemma 4 models are designed to deliver frontier-level performance at each size. They are well-suited for reasoning, agentic workflows, coding, and multimodal understanding.
entry.content:
Gemma 4 models are designed to deliver frontier-level performance at each size. They are well-suited for reasoning, agentic workflows, coding, and multimodal understanding.

Pulls: 2.5M

Tags: 17

entry.title: qwen3.5
entry.summary: Qwen 3.5 is a family of open-source multimodal models that delivers exceptional utility and performance.
entry.content:
Qwen 3.5 is a family of open-source multimodal models that delivers exceptional utility and performance.

Pulls: 5.8M

Tags: 58

entry.title: nemotron-cascade-2
entry.summary: An open 30B MoE model from NVIDIA with 3B activated parameters that delivers strong reasoning and agentic capabilities.
entry.content:
An open 30B MoE model from NVIDIA with 3B activated parameters that delivers strong reasoning and agentic capabilities.

Tags: 3

entry.title: minimax-m2.7
entry.summary: MiniMax's M2-series model for coding, agentic workflows, and professional productivity.
entry.content:

entry.title: nemotron-3-nano
entry.summary: Nemotron-3-Nano is a new Standard for Efficient, Open, and Intelligent Agentic Models, now updated with a 4B parameter count model.
entry.content:
Nemotron-3-Nano is a new Standard for Efficient, Open, and Intelligent Agentic Models, now updated with a 4B parameter count model.

Pulls: 383.7K

Tags: 9

entry.title: nemotron-3-super
entry.summary: NVIDIA Nemotron 3 Super is a 120B open MoE model activating just 12B parameters to deliver maximum compute efficiency and accuracy for complex multi-agent applications.
entry.content:
NVIDIA Nemotron 3 Super is a 120B open MoE model activating just 12B parameters to deliver maximum compute efficiency and accuracy for complex multi-agent applications.

Pulls: 223K

Tags: 7

entry.title: lfm2
entry.summary: LFM2 is a family of hybrid models designed for on-device deployment. LFM2-24B-A2B is the largest model in the family, scaling the architecture to 24 billion parameters while keeping inference efficient.
entry.content:
LFM2 is a family of hybrid models designed for on-device deployment. LFM2-24B-A2B is the largest model in the family, scaling the architecture to 24 billion parameters while keeping inference efficient.

Pulls: 1.1M

Tags: 6

entry.title: minimax-m2.5
entry.summary: MiniMax-M2.5 is a state-of-the-art large language model designed for real-world productivity and coding tasks.
entry.content:
MiniMax-M2.5 is a state-of-the-art large language model designed for real-world productivity and coding tasks.

Pulls: 159.9K

Tags: 1

entry.title: glm-5
entry.summary: A strong reasoning and agentic model from Z.ai with 744B total parameters (40B active), built for complex systems engineering and long-horizon tasks.
entry.content:
A strong reasoning and agentic model from Z.ai with 744B total parameters (40B active), built for complex systems engineering and long-horizon tasks.

Pulls: 181.7K

Tags: 1

entry.title: qwen3-coder-next
entry.summary: Qwen3-Coder-Next is a coding-focused language model from Alibaba's Qwen team, optimized for agentic coding workflows and local development.
entry.content:
Qwen3-Coder-Next is a coding-focused language model from Alibaba's Qwen team, optimized for agentic coding workflows and local development.

Pulls: 1M

Tags: 4

entry.title: glm-ocr
entry.summary: GLM-OCR is a multimodal OCR model for complex document understanding, built on the GLM-V encoder–decoder architecture.
entry.content:
GLM-OCR is a multimodal OCR model for complex document understanding, built on the GLM-V encoder–decoder architecture.

Pulls: 247K

Tags: 3

entry.title: kimi-k2.5
entry.summary: Kimi K2.5 is an open-source, native multimodal agentic model that seamlessly integrates vision and language understanding with advanced agentic capabilities, instant and thinking modes, as well as conversational and agentic paradigms.
entry.content:
Kimi K2.5 is an open-source, native multimodal agentic model that seamlessly integrates vision and language understanding with advanced agentic capabilities, instant and thinking modes, as well as conversational and agentic paradigms.

Pulls: 236.2K

Tags: 1

entry.title: glm-4.7-flash
entry.summary: As the strongest model in the 30B class, GLM-4.7-Flash offers a new option for lightweight deployment that balances performance and efficiency.
entry.content:
As the strongest model in the 30B class, GLM-4.7-Flash offers a new option for lightweight deployment that balances performance and efficiency.

Pulls: 1.1M

Tags: 4

entry.title: functiongemma
entry.summary: FunctionGemma is a specialized version of Google's Gemma 3 270M model fine-tuned explicitly for function calling.
entry.content:
FunctionGemma is a specialized version of Google's Gemma 3 270M model fine-tuned explicitly for function calling.

Pulls: 144.3K

Tags: 4
